name: Guanaco 33B
license: Apache-2.0 (LoRA adapter); base LLaMA-33B weights under Meta's non-commercial research license
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (LLaMA-33B base) with 4-bit QLoRA adapter finetune
note: QLoRA 4-bit finetune of LLaMA-33B on OASST1 that reached 97.8% of ChatGPT's Vicuna-benchmark quality (second-best in the paper, after the 65B model's 99.3%) after roughly 12 hours on a single 24GB consumer GPU.

results.notes: Elo rating, Vicuna benchmark, human raters, rank 4
Elo rating, OpenAssistant benchmark, GPT-4 judge, rank 4
Chatbot Arena Elo rating for Guanaco-33B, LMSYS Leaderboard Week 8 update ('Introducing MT-Bench and Vicuna-33B') - briefly the top open model on the arena at the time.
GPT-4-judged MT-Bench score for Guanaco-33B from the same LMSYS Leaderboard Week 8 update table.

ARC-Challenge 25-shot acc_norm (0.625) from the HF Open LLM Leaderboard (old) details dataset for timdettmers/guanaco-33b-merged — the official full-weights merge of the same LoRA adapter by the original authors.
HellaSwag 10-shot acc_norm (0.845) from the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard (old) details dataset for timdettmers/guanaco-33b-merged.
TruthfulQA MC2 0-shot (0.512) from the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard (old) details dataset for timdettmers/guanaco-33b-merged. No TruthfulQA had been tracked for the 33B model before.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real model via HF model card (fetched). paramsB=33, license, ctxK=2 (LLaMA-1 base), MMLU=57, Vicuna Elo=1009 (human, rank4), OpenAssistant Elo=1002 (GPT-4 judge, rank4) all literally match the HF page. releaseDate 2023-05-23 confirmed via arXiv abstract page (2305.14314) which also literally states 'reaching 99.3% of the performance level of ChatGPT' but CORRECTED the note field: fetched full paper text (ar5iv) shows the 99.3% figure belongs to the 65B model; Guanaco 33B is explicitly called 'the second best model reaching 97.8% of the performance level of ChatGPT' and Table 6 lists 'Guanaco 33B ... 97.8%'. The 'trained on 24GB consumer GPU in <12 hours' claim for 33B is verbatim-confirmed in the paper. Original record incorrectly attributed 99.3% to the 33B model; fixed to 97.8%.
